CREATE DICTIONARY dict_name (key UInt64, parent_id UInt64) PRIMARY KEY key;
SELECT dictGetHierarchy('dict_name', 3) AS hierarchy FOR key IN (3, 4, 5);
CREATE TABLE parent_keys AS SELECT DISTINCT parent_id FROM dict_name;
SELECT d.key, dictGetHierarchy('dict_name', d.key) FROM dict_name AS d JOIN parent_keys AS p ON d.key = p.parent_id;
WITH (SELECT dictGetHierarchy('dict_name', 2)) AS hierarchy_2 SELECT * FROM dict_name WHERE key IN hierarchy_2;
SELECT d.key, dictGetHierarchy('dict_name', d.key) AS hierarchy FROM dict_name AS d WHERE d.key BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dict_name WHERE dictGetHierarchy('dict_name', key) = [0];
